calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Bertram R. Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Ricarrdo Fairries, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Henry Yandell, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank.
Mario Morales, Custodian of Records for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Bertram R. Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Ricarrdo Fairries, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts, Book Account, Account Stated and Quantum Meruit was filed on January 9, 2018, and was personally served on defendant Bertram R. Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Ricarrdo Fairries, an individual, on January 15, 2018.
Default as to defendant Bertram R. Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Ricarrdo Fairries, an individual, was entered on June 25, 2018.
DOE defendants and plaintiff's 2nd Cause of Action for Quantum Meruit were dismissed on October 25, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank, and against the defaulted defendant Bertram R. Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Fairries, a/k/a Bertram Ricarrdo Fairries, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,069.70.
Costs - $435.00.
Total - $16,504.70.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Continued To Dec-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
